articles.title: Could cosmic memory explain dark matter, dark energy, and black holes?
articles.description: A new theory suggests the universe is constantly recording its own history in the fabric of spacetime. If correct, this cosmic memory could help solve some of the biggest puzzles in physics, from black holes to dark matter and the universe’s ultimate fate.

articles.title: Sun Youth unveils its new community centre in Villeray
